default_creds.context: basic auth when N8N_BASIC_AUTH_ACTIVE=true with default password

misconfig_patterns: N8N_BASIC_AUTH_ACTIVE not set — auth disabled entirely
Credentials stored in workflow JSON in plaintext
N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY left at default or in Docker logs

active_probe.false_positive_check: HTML response must include n8n branding in title or footer

deployment_tells: /api/v1 returns workflow list when auth disabled
PostgreSQL or SQLite backend referenced in diagnostics
pivot_paths: GET /api/v1/workflows → workflow JSON → extract embedded service credentials
Webhook endpoints → trigger arbitrary workflow execution without auth
GET /rest/admin/diagnostics → stack version info via 401 header leakage
sources: Agentic AI for Offensive Cybersecurity (9781806114474) ch03
